summary: Completed testing of Environment Manager features for CSDROP Portal (Iteration 10). All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly. Health check returns status for all 4 dependencies (playwright, playwright_stealth, RestrictedPython, chromium) with ready=true. Repair endpoint starts background task. Launch pre-flight check working.
passed_tests: GET /api/csdrop/health returns status for all 4 dependencies
GET /api/csdrop/health returns ready=true when all dependencies OK
GET /api/csdrop/health accepts any Bearer token (uses Depends(security))
POST /api/admin/repair starts background task and returns status:ok
GET /api/admin/repair-status returns running state and logs
GET /api/admin/repair-status shows logs after repair completes
Health check shows python_path as full path (sys.executable)
Frontend: System Health panel shows 'ALL SYSTEMS GO' indicator
Frontend: 4 dependency indicators shown (playwright, playwright_stealth, RestrictedPython, chromium)
Frontend: ENV HEALTH stat card shows 'OK'
Frontend: Sovereign Bot tab shows Launch button when env is ready
Frontend: Code Runner execution still works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Environment Manager features fully functional. Health check at GET /api/csdrop/health returns status for playwright, playwright_stealth, RestrictedPython, and chromium. All dependencies currently installed (ready=true). Repair endpoint at POST /api/admin/repair runs pip install + playwright install chromium in background. Repair status at GET /api/admin/repair-status shows running state and logs. Launch pre-flight check rejects if dependencies missing. Frontend shows System Health panel with green indicators for all 4 dependencies, ENV HEALTH stat card, and Launch button when env is ready.
